original_question:
Calculate the difference between the sums of two sequences:
$(2001 + 2002 + 2003 + \cdots + 2093) - (301 + 302 + 303 + \cdots + 393) = ?$
A) 150,000
B) 157,100
C) 158,100
D) 160,000
E) 180,000

Present the answer in LaTex format: \boxed{Your answer}

entries.original_incomplete_question: Calculate the difference between the sums of two sequences: $([BLANK] + [BLANK] + [BLANK] + \cdots + [BLANK]) - ([BLANK] + [BLANK] + [BLANK] + \cdots + [BLANK]) = ?$ A) 150,000 B) 157,100 C) 158,100 D) 160,000 E) 180,000
